allow: Bash(cd /Users/ji233/Documents/0MyProjects/kaleidodanmu && ls -la && echo "---TREE---" && find . -type d -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' -not -path '*/.next/*' -not -path '*/dist/*' | head -100)

Bash(cd /Users/ji233/Documents/0MyProjects/kaleidodanmu && \(pnpm dev > /tmp/kdanmu-dev.log 2>&1 &\) && echo "starting..."; for i in $\(seq 1 40\); do if curl -sf -o /dev/null http://localhost:3000/ 2>/dev/null; then echo "UP on :3000 after ${i}s"; break; fi; sleep 1; done; echo "---LOG---"; tail -8 /tmp/kdanmu-dev.log)

Bash(cd /Users/ji233/Documents/0MyProjects/kaleidodanmu && mkdir -p packages/template/assets && printf '# 把图片/音频/json 等静态资源放在这里，代码中用 assetUrl\("文件名"\) 引用。\\n' > packages/template/assets/README.md && echo "=== pnpm install ===" && pnpm install 2>&1 | tail -8)

Bash(cd /Users/ji233/Documents/0MyProjects/kaleidodanmu && \(node dist/cli/index.js dev --cwd packages/template > /tmp/kdev.log 2>&1 &\) ; sleep 5
PORT=$\(grep -oE 'localhost:[0-9]+' /tmp/kdev.log | head -1 | cut -d: -f2\)
echo "dev log:" && sed -n '1,8p' /tmp/kdev.log
echo "detected port: ${PORT:-none}"
if [ -n "$PORT" ]; then echo "=== curl index.html ===" && curl -s "http://localhost:$PORT/" | grep -oE '<title>[^<]*</title>|preview.ts'; echo "=== curl preview.ts \(module served\) ===" && curl -s "http://localhost:$PORT/dev/preview.ts" | head -c 80; fi
pkill -f "packages/template" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "vite" 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "dev stopped")
